title: [Prochot Flow] Verify Prochot IMH Entry and Exit Flow
description:
(Sections with * are mandatory. You must fill them in, or say "Not Applicable" or "N/A" if you have seriously considered it and determined there's nothing to say. Remove these instructions and the explanatory text in each section as you fill things in.)

Flow *

use simics yaml and fuses in attachments to load simics, allows for freq scaling for the core

use imh ufs_control.min_ratio and set ratio above Pm, likely above 800Mhz at least

confirm using ufs_status.current_ratio that ratio is above 800Mhz or Pm

inject Prochot: oakstream.mb.mcp0.imh_die0.punit.punit[0]->prochot_trigger, prochot simics HAS PROCHOT modeling

confirm ratio dropped to Pm(800Mhz)

remove prochot 

confirm ratio returned to precious value before prochot


revised flow, 2025 WW46:

  • get pf curves for each gv domain
  • set each domain tohighest ratio in the curve to ensure throttling at any power and cydyn point
  • get response power to determine the intended ceiling
  • confirm each domain isbelow that ceiling
  • release prochot and confirm freq above the prev ceiling 


IMH Entry Flow:

  • IMH Primecode ensures that the programmed value does not exceed TDP nor is below PKG_MIN_POWER by clipping the value if need be.
  • IMH Primecode translates the power to a frequency limit for cores, IO fabric, Memory Fabric and CBB fabric frequency.
  • IMH Primecode sends the HPM message PROCHOT_POWER_LIMITED_FREQ_LIMIT to secondary IMH and its leaf CBB dies.
  • On a prochot event the primary IMH receives the Prochot GPIO signal and ships them to secondary IMH and its leaf CBB as die to die wire.
  • The IMH die asserts fast throttle to accelerators.
  • Both the IMH Primecode reduce their respective Fabric frequencies as per the Prochot Power frequency limit.


Once the Prochot event passes.

IMH Exit Flow:

  • Once the prochot GPIO de-asserts the primary IMH de-asserts the D2D signals.
  • The IMH die de-asserts fast throttle to accelerators.
  • Both the IMH Primecode removes their respective Fabric frequency ceiling due to Prochot.


1. Read PROCHOT_RESPONSE_POWER 

2. Inject prochot using DFX or other script

3. Verify IMH frequencies are reduced according to PROCHOT_RESPONSE_POWER

4. Release prochot signal

5. Verify IMH removes any core frequency ceiling
